query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal, publishedModel
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-22' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND (awayTeam LIKE '%iowa%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%iowa%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%florida%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%florida%'
       OR awayTeam LIKE '%utah%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%utah%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%arizona%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%arizona%')
ORDER BY startTimeEst;

       awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal, publishedModel

  AND (awayTeam LIKE '%iowa%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%iowa%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%florida%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%florida%'
       OR awayTeam LIKE '%utah%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%utah%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%arizona%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%arizona%')
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
